name: PunjiVR: The Vietnam War
short_description: PunjiVR is an unforgiving tactical shooter set during the Vietnam War. Gameplay is non-linear, replayable, and intense. This is not just "another VR shooter" or a tech demo. The jungle wants you dead, will you give in?
detailed_description:
Version 2

Version 2 was a free update released on April 26th, 2025. It rebuilt PunjiVR entirely from scratch to fix all of the core issues and limitations that plagued the original build of the game.

Because of the recent remake, please be aware that the current version of PunjiVR has only been out since the 26th of April, and it may have less content than expected for the store page's release date. Still, there are hours of content currently in game with much more on the way!


About the Game

PunjiVR aims to create a realistic but accessible war experience that takes full advantage of Virtual Reality.

  • Unique and Satisfying Gunplay: (Physics-Based Recoil, Weapon Jamming, Weapon Sway, Advanced Handling, & More!)

  • Eargasmic Audio: (Realistic Weapon Sounds, Distance Propagation, Environmental Reverb)

  • Intelligent & Challenging AI: (Take Cover, Communication, Flanking, Suppression, & More!)

  • High Lethality: (Realistic Damage and Ballistic Models, Ricochets, Bullet Penetration, Bullet Drop)

  • Unique & Replayable Mission Design

  • Large Variety of Weapons & Tools

  • Custom Loadouts & Advanced Inventory System: (Item weight and bulk affect how much you can store, but also your speed, agility, visibility, and weapon handling)

  • Traps! 

Additional Features:

  • Long-Term Active Development (~Monthly Updates!)

  • A Growing Community & Active Developer

---

VR-First Design:

PunjiVR is developed solely as a Virtual Reality experience.

  • Full Body Physics (including physical jumping, crawling, & climbing)

  • Unique Locomotion Controls (combination of joystick movement with armswinger)

  • Realistic & Interactive Weapon Handling

  • Minimal UI and No Laser Pointers

  • Unique Inventory System 

  • Plenty of Settings/Options to make PunjiVR yours

  • Unique Inventory System

PunjiVR utilizes the unique features and aspects of VR to create a new style of tactical shooter that immerses you into the conflicts of Southeast Asia like no other.
